sentences.english: When I woke up this morning rain was hitting the window.
sentences.korean: 오늘 아침에 일어났을 때 비가 창문을 때리고 있었어요.

sentences.english: I didn't want to get out of bed at all.
But I had a test at school so I got dressed quickly.
sentences.korean: 하지만 학교에 시험이 있어서 빨리 옷을 입었어요.

sentences.english: I grabbed my umbrella and ran to the bus stop.
Even though it was raining I made it to school on time.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
